**Saturday, June 27, 2015**

Senator Paul's fair and flat tax reform plan continues to receive praise from tax policy experts and conservative political commentators across the country who agree with Rand that it is time to blow up the tax code and start over. Senator Paul's plan shows he is ready to lead Day 1 in the White House and voters are taking notice, as evidenced by a recent national poll that confirms Rand Paul is tied for the lead among Republicans.

We have a long way to go, but the last couple of weeks have shown that we have what it takes to win the Republican nomination. With the media and political experts ready to pounce on Senator Paul's bold proposals, a strong finish to the quarter will be critical to show just how deep is his support. Please chip in to our [End of Quarter Moneybomb](secure.randpaul.com/donate?sr=hmnewsletter) to keep the momentum going!

More news and updates can be found below. Stay tuned for the next Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Republican Rand Paul's Bold Fair And Flat Income Tax Plan
Republican, Rand Paul's latest move in the presidential race is one that could completely change the tax landscape of the United States. The audacious plan is designed to bring income tax levels to a flat 14.5% for everyone.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28679119:27553743799:m:1:879035888:80CBD18049685D91A1FB84E68BA952F9:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul On Obamatrade: No Sane Reason For Making The Trade Treaty Classified
My consistent opposition to the Trade Promotion Authority, or TPA, stems from my belief that Congress has already given too much power to the Presidency.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28679120:27553743799:m:1:879035888:80CBD18049685D91A1FB84E68BA952F9:r)
---
|
### I Am An Evangelical Minister And I Support Rand Paul
As I studied Rand Paul and his message, it became clear that there were some very real connections that I had with him on a personal level. As I vetted the 2016 candidates, I had a clear agenda to determine who addressed the real issues facing our nation.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28679121:27553743799:m:1:879035888:80CBD18049685D91A1FB84E68BA952F9:r)

---

Peter, I need your help to make our voices heard loud and clear.
Throughout this campaign we have stood together. When few in Washington would even take us seriously, we stood together. Together, we have shocked Washington. Today we are at the top of every national poll. Now let's show them that we must be heard.

With your help, as the second fundraising quarter comes to a close on June 30, we will set a record. A record of 200,000 donations in just 16 weeks. I need your support right now to make that goal and shock Washington and the media.

**[So I ask you to think about why you first got involved, and recommit to our shared success by making a donation before the clock runs out.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28688925:27558859943:m:1:876315805:9D1B710C8BF136B4A3A7BE65ADBD76F8:r)**

If you believe we need a leader that cares more about the next generation than the next election, **[I ask for your support now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28688925:27558859943:m:1:876315805:9D1B710C8BF136B4A3A7BE65ADBD76F8:r)**

If you will stand with me to change Washington back to a government of, by, and for the people, [**I ask for your support now****.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28688925:27558859943:m:1:876315805:9D1B710C8BF136B4A3A7BE65ADBD76F8:r)

Thank you for your generosity, and for standing with me in this great effort to heal and revive America.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

subject: ## I have some bad news ##
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The press is ready to write the stories about "inevitable" candidates and their special interest big bucks.

A strong fundraising quarter will fire a shot across the bow of anyone who believes the Presidency is determined by "whose turn it is."

And with polls showing me leading Hillary Clinton in Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania there is one question on everyone's mind...

Do I have the grassroots muscle to win?

**[Please chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the June 30th fundraising deadline to help to make the answer to that question a loud and clear"YES!"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28690719:27559809593:m:1:879035888:44CDE44FD5E616AFEE3CCA1E8DAABDA8:r)**

Fellow Conservative, this report is critical.

With polls proving I am the Republican best positioned to defeat Hillary Clinton the media is sure to pull from their bag of tricks to minimize conservatives.

They would like nothing more than to make this election a contest between yesterday's candidates spouting off yesterday's failed policies.

You and I know DISASTER follows when we allow the media to pick our candidates.

To win this election our party must nominate a candidate who will upend the Big Government status quo by boldly championing our conservative values.

I proved with my filibuster that forced President Obama's illegal NSA spying to expire...

... And my 14.5% flat tax proposal that kicks the IRS out of your life for good...

... I am in this race to defeat the Washington Machine!

And a strong End of Quarter fundraising report will prove to the press I have the grassroots behind me.

Allowing the media to select our party's nominee is bad news for our chances against Hillary Clinton.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my End of Quarter Money Bomb before the June 30th deadline and help my campaign build a head of steam](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28690719:27559809593:m:1:879035888:44CDE44FD5E616AFEE3CCA1E8DAABDA8:r)**.

name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: The 2016 Election: A Referendum on Obamacare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the following address: http://act.tedcruz.org/index.php/email/emailWebview?mkt_tok=3RkMMJWWfF9wsRonva%2FNZKXonjHpfsX76%2B0sWKewlMI%2F0ER3fOvrPUfGjI4DTcBjI%2BSLDwEYGJlv6SgFSLHEMaFt3LgJWBg%3D

Hello Friend,

"Every GOP candidate for the Republican nomination should know that this decision makes the 2016 election a referendum on the full repeal of Obamacare." That's what Ted said <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-any-candidate-not-willing-to-make-2016-a-referendum-on-repealing-obamacare-should-step-aside/> following the Supreme Court's King v. Burwell decision on Thursday. And he's absolutely right.

Because of the ruling, Obamacare will now be responsible for imposing illegal taxes on more than 11 million individuals and for burdening hundreds of thousands of businesses with illegal penalties on their workers, killing jobs, and further slowing economic growth. President Obama’s health care law remains deeply unpopular and is harming countless Americans by increasing costs and worsening the quality of care. Ted remains fully committed to the repeal of Obamacare—every single word of it. And, with your help, in 2017 we will do exactly that.

And just yesterday, the Supreme Court doubled down on violating their judicial oaths with a 5-4 opinion that undermines not just the definition of marriage, but the very foundations of our representative form of government. In response, Ted wrote an op-ed in National Review Online <http://www.nationalreview.com/article/420409/ted-cruz-supreme-court-constitutional-amendment> that you're going to want to read <http://www.nationalreview.com/article/420409/ted-cruz-supreme-court-constitutional-amendment>. In it, he discusses Constitutional remedies to a lawless Supreme Court because "we must hold fast to the miracle that is our Constitution and our republic; we must not submit our constitutional freedoms, and the promise of our nation, to judicial tyranny."

Earlier this week, Ted gave a speech <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XmLeKbfqAd0> at the Heritage Foundation in which he reveals the cronyism that runs deep in Washington, powered by the "Washington Cartel" comprised of establishment politicians and corporate lobbyists who continue to benefit big government and big business at the expense of millions of Americans.
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XmLeKbfqAd0>
In the speech, Ted notes, "Washington has done a great job of one thing – picking winners and losers, except it’s clear each time who the losers are: American families, who are struggling to pay skyrocketing health care premiums and tuition costs; it’s our community banks and marketplaces that are going out of business; it’s young entrepreneurs and small business owners." But the good news, Friend, is we're going to break the Washington Cartel, and we're going to do it with your help!
In addition, last Sunday on Father’s Day, the campaign released a video <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U> in which Ted introduces his father, Rafael, who tells his dramatic story and explains why he so passionately desired to instill in his son a profound appreciation, gratitude and love for America.
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U>
>From an immigrant who could barely speak the language to a candidate for President of the United States in one generation, Rafael Cruz’s life story embodies the promise of America, and we hope you'll listen to and share his story here <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t7JksVsWv4U>.
All of us at Team Cruz hope you have an excellent weekend and thank you for your continued support.

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

body:

Friend,

My good friend Jeb needs you. We're approaching the end of our first fundraising quarter, and we know Hillary and Co. are all watching to see how we do.

[**Will you help? Real quick, Friend, will you chip in $25 right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mqngmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjddcn_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Hillary's been in hiding - ducking reporters and vetting supporters just to join her in coffee shops and cafes, more concerned with photo ops than substantive conversation.

All the while, Jeb has thrived on the campaign trail, taking over 8,000 questions over the past six months, meeting with thousands of ordinary, everyday Americans, and telling his story and showing his heart.

[**Please, Friend, donate whatever you can today. Help us meet our goal of $200,000 so Jeb can continue answering questions, running on his record and embracing voters in all corners of America.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lknpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclnnmn_nprddjkw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Please chip in today, before the June 30 deadline.

Thank you,

Gov. Luis Fortuño

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Overturn Citizens United
body:
#
Friend -
In this election, there's going to be a whole mess of shadowy Super PACs funded by the super wealthy for nearly every presidential candidate.

That is, everyone except for our campaign.

The Supreme Court's decisions in Citizens United and other cases opened the gates to a flood of billions of dollars that threatens to undermine our democracy.

I have led the fight to put an end to the corrupting influence of big money in our politics. What we need now is a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United.

**Our democracy is not for sale.[Can you sign our petition to join me in supporting a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United? Click here to add your name.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21dc/43f17890/5f5ad7cc/621dac90/808724954/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/citizens-united?source=em150627a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=citizensunited&utm_content=petition")**

It's not an accident that 99% of new income created in the last 5 years went to the top 1%. It's not an accident that Republicans refuse to accept the reality of climate change. It's not an accident that the Republican budget calls for huge tax breaks for billionaires.

The lesson here is that our political system isn't broken, it's rigged.

The laws are written by politicians to please the corporations and ultra-wealthy, who bought those politicians with hundreds of millions of dollars in political contributions.

We need a political revolution to return our government to be of the people, by the people, for the people.

It starts with taking our country's destiny out of the hands of the billionaires who want to buy this election. We must overturn Citizens United to get big money out of politics.

[**Click here to add your name to our petition calling for a constitutional amendment to overturn Citizens United.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21dc/43f17890/5f5ad7cc/621dac90/808724954/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/citizens-united?source=em150627a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=berniesanders&utm_campaign=citizensunited&utm_content=petition")

Thanks for your support,

Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21dc/43f17890/5f5ad7cc/621dac91/808724954/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150627a-citizensunited")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21dc/43f17890/5f5ad7cc/621dac9e/808724954/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb21dc/43f17890/5f5ad7cc/621dac9f/808724954/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

Whose "turn" is it?

I'm afraid that's the only thing many in our national media care about when covering the race for the Republican nomination for President of the United States.

Nevermind the American people are fed up with the Big Government status quo under BOTH parties.

Nevermind the polls show me besting Hillary Clinton in key swing states like Colorado, Iowa, New Hampshire, Ohio, and Pennsylvania.

But with the FEC's June 30th End of Quarter Fundraising Deadline, this is your chance to tell all the so-called "experts" that the American people will pick the next Republican nominee for President -- NOT the media.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 or more today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28696956:27571520866:m:1:879035888:69B140C31B86B04BAE2E630BA8CB52E1:r)**?

This is the most important FEC deadline I have faced. Ever!

The media and Big Government members of BOTH parties have seen the strong poll numbers I'm posting over the past couple of months.

But they want so badly to just dismiss my surge of momentum any way possible.

A strong fundraising quarter will help ensure they can't.

A strong fundraising quarter will help me rally even more Americans with my strong stands to:

*** Cut taxes and spending. My 14.5% flat-rate tax plan would drive a stake through the heart of the IRS, return $2 TRILLION to the American people and create 1.4 million new jobs;

*** End the reign of career politicians by passing term limits;

*** Force Members of Congress to read the bills they vote on -- instead of springing last-minute thousand page bills on the American people that are laden with handouts to those with the best lobbyists;

*** Repeal ALL of ObamaCare. Every last word of this horrendous government takeover of our healthcare;

*** Audit the Federal Reserve;

*** Protect the entire Bill of Rights -- including the Second Amendment, our right to religious liberty, the God-given right to life and our right to privacy from government snooping.

Fellow Conservative, these are the reforms that can finally destroy the Washington Machine and renew freedom and prosperity in America.

**[So please chip in as generously as you can today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28696956:27571520866:m:1:879035888:69B140C31B86B04BAE2E630BA8CB52E1:r)**.

body:
Hey, Hillary needs your help. | Friend --

I could yell and scream about [**how important it is for you to chip in to support Hillary before this Tuesday at midnight**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI5MzU1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNzE0NDQxS0&mt=1&rt=0), but I don't think I need to.

It's the first fundraising deadline of this campaign to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.

If you need more than that to get going... well, I'm just not sure what to tell you!

If we're going to win this race, we need to build an organization from the ground floor up -- that's why Hillary needs you to step up at the very beginning.

**So before Tuesday, be one of the people who is going to elect Hillary. Donate $1 or more:**

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI5MzU1NzcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTgyNzE0NDQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

James Carville |
